subject: [APPC] Use the common mariadb-galera instance
commit_message:
[APPC] Use the common mariadb-galera instance

Have following updates for APPC:
-Add section under .Values.global for shared mariadb instance default
info with a condition to instantiate local instance
-Add section under .Values for mariadb-init project
-Add condition under requirments.yaml to install local mariadb instance
-Update statefulset with DB host/port parameter and reflect it into
resource files, using the templates defined under templates/_mariadb.tpl

Following updates for APPC-Ansible-server:
-Update .Values file to reflect the use of shared or local MariaDB
-Update statefulset with DB host/port parameter and reflect it into
resource files, using the templates defined under templates/_mariadb.tpl
-Update config file to retrieve mysql actual DB service name

Issue-ID: OOM-2776
Signed-off-by: Mahmoud Abdelhamid <mahmoud.abdelhamid@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ib244a1af7ad9bedb21bc67b217de80106671f338

Patch Set 3:

note we do not test appc at all
- no more healthcheck since the component is unmaintained
- no automated tests in smoke leveraging appc

Patch Set 3:

APPC is not enabled by default so it won't be tested.

I'm just worried that maybe appc and sdnc are using the same database name and then it may be complicated to use the same db engine.
@Dan, do you remember such issues?
